title: EDM v0.7.0 to v0.8.0 Migration Crosswalk
description: Documents changes from EDM v0.7.0 to v0.8.0 including Partner Profiles, meta.profile two-tier enum, and arc_type enum expansions.

meta_profile_two_tier.description: meta.profile now accepts partner profile IDs in addition to canonical values. Canonical values (essential, extended, full) remain valid. Non-canonical values trigger partner profile registry resolution.
meta_profile_two_tier.pattern: Canonical enum values OR partner profile ID string (reverse-DNS notation)
meta_profile_two_tier.migration_action: No migration required. Existing canonical values remain valid.

enum_expansions.rationale: WhatMattered benchmark miss analysis (Q7, Q13). Both values were in production use (Supabase arc_signatures table) and are semantically distinct arc patterns. Gratitude: moments of thankfulness and appreciation. Authenticity: self-alignment, identity congruence.

partner_profiles.description: Partner Profiles (Section 3.7.6) enable vertical-specific field selection within the EDM profile system. A partner profile is a named, versioned schema declaration with a base canonical profile and a subset of included fields.
partner_profiles.relationship_to_canonical: Partner profile declares a base profile (essential/extended/full) and a subset of included_fields. Extraction runs to base profile; filtering at response time.
partner_profiles.certification_minimum_bar: 10+ populated affective fields from the 57-field affective set (Core, Constellation, Milky_Way, Gravity, Impulse domains)

schema_hosting.description: v0.8.0 schemas hosted at canonical URLs

backward_compatibility.v07_to_v08: v0.7.0 artifacts remain valid under v0.8.0. No fields removed. New arc_type values are additive. Partner profiles are optional.
backward_compatibility.v08_to_v07: v0.8.0 artifacts using new arc_type values (gratitude, authenticity) will fail v0.7.0 strict validation. v0.8.0 artifacts using partner profile IDs in meta.profile will fail v0.7.0 strict validation.

forward_compatibility.existing_artifacts: No migration required for existing v0.7.0 artifacts
forward_compatibility.new_extractions: New extractions may use partner profile IDs in meta.profile and new arc_type values
forward_compatibility.validation: v0.8.0 validators accept all v0.7.0 values plus new arc_type values and partner profile IDs

steps: 2. Optionally update meta.profile to a partner profile ID if field filtering is desired
3. Optionally use new arc_type values (gratitude, authenticity) where appropriate
4. Update schema $ref URLs to v0.8.0 canonical URLs
5. Validate against appropriate v0.8.0 profile schema

migration_script_template.description: Pseudocode for migrating v0.7.0 artifacts to v0.8.0
code: // Partner profiles are optional - existing canonical profiles remain valid
